ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_number" TEXT /* Customer number assigned by the system */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved */,
  "lifetime_value" REAL /* Calculated customer lifetime value */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Customer's marital status */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral */,
  "first_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of first interaction with the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer holding the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy (e.g., Personal Auto, Corporate Auto) */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of vehicle covered by the policy */,
  "monthly_premium" REAL /* Monthly premium amount for the policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  "coverage_limits" INTEGER /* Maximum coverage limit */,
  "deductible" INTEGER /* Deductible amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount claimed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., Pending, Approved, Denied) */,
  "cause_of_claim" TEXT /* Cause of the claim */,
  "claim_adjuster" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent handling the claim */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  "paid_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the claim */,
  "outstanding_amount" REAL /* Amount still outstanding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_adjuster FOREIGN KEY ("claim_adjuster") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the complaint */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy associated with the complaint */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was registered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint resolution (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "assigned_agent" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent assigned to the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_assigned_agent FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_agent") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the agent belongs to (e.g., Claims, Sales) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was hired */,
  "supervisor" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent's supervisor */,
  "number_of_policies_sold" INTEGER /* Number of policies sold by the agent */,
  "customer_satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Average customer satisfaction rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy type */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed coverage provided by the policy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed coverage provided for the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for securely storing user passwords */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, agent, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., login, view claim) */,
  "specific_action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_claims" (
  "policy_claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy-claim association */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_claims_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)
